title: Governance Execution Tracking via GitHub Projects
summary: Establish a project management layer using GitHub Issues and GitHub Projects to track execution of multi-phase governance decisions. The current contract supports binary attestation (executed/not) but proposals like #003 (Financial Infrastructure) contain 90-day roadmaps with dozens of milestones. This proposal bridges the gap between on-chain attestation and real-world execution tracking.
body: The governance pipeline currently has three states: proposed, decided, and attested/diverged. For single-action proposals (ratify a document, implement a script), this is sufficient. But for multi-phase proposals with sequential dependencies and time-delayed milestones, there is no mechanism to track incremental progress. Proposal #003 (Financial Infrastructure) approved a 90-day roadmap with 20+ action items across 7 domains, some of which depend on external approvals (Mercury, D-U-N-S) with multi-week timelines. The binary on-chain attestation cannot capture this complexity. This proposal introduces GitHub Projects as the execution tracking layer, with GitHub Issues as individual milestones. On-chain attestation happens at defined checkpoints when sufficient milestones are complete. The governance engine workflow is updated to auto-create issues from approved roadmaps.

proposedChanges.change: Create 'OpenInnovate Governance' project board with columns: Backlog, Blocked, In Progress, Done. Each approved proposal with a roadmap generates issues automatically.
Create .github/ISSUE_TEMPLATE/governance-milestone.yml for structured milestone tracking with fields: proposal ID, domain, milestone, dependencies, target date, attestation checkpoint.

Define checkpoint rules: on-chain attestation occurs when all milestones in a phase are complete. For #003: Phase 1 = bank + D-U-N-S (Week 1-2), Phase 2 = tradelines (Week 2-8), Phase 3 = store credit (Week 9-12), Phase 4 = credit cards (Month 5-8).
Add post-evaluation step that parses approved roadmaps and creates GitHub Issues via gh CLI.

retroactiveApplication.proposal003: Create issues for all 20+ action items in the Financial Infrastructure roadmap. Mark Mercury application and D-U-N-S registration as Done. Remaining items as Backlog or Blocked.
retroactiveApplication.proposal004: Create single issue for verify.py implementation. Mark as Done (commit 9519023).

action: Create GitHub Project board, issue templates, and retroactive issues for existing proposals. Update governance workflow to auto-create issues from future approved roadmaps.
